column1: I was charged twice for the same order and no one is responding to my emails. This is unacceptable!
The delivery took 3 weeks instead of the promised 2 days. Very disappointed.
I can't log into my account even after resetting the password multiple times.
The product arrived broken and doesn't work at all. I want a refund immediately.
Payment went through but I haven't received any confirmation email.
The shipping cost was way higher than expected for such a small item.
My account got locked after trying to change my password. Urgent help needed.
The item I received is completely different from what I ordered. Fraud alert!
I need to cancel my order and get a full refund. This product is defective.
Great service, everything arrived on time and as described. Thank you!
